name: The Adventures of Hoshi the cat! | Hoshi
description:
"Meow Meow!"

And she makes her diligent return, the black cat Hoshi begins her journey exploring Willowrose! I wonder what she's up to?

Willowrose, the Town of Gold

Set in a mixture of a fantasy and modern reality, Terra is the exact same as our world, save for the supernatural and sometimes extraterrestrial life that populate it. The world filled with prejudice and inequalities, there are few safe havens for humans, demi-humans, and monsters, the three main categories is Terra, to live together.

Willowrose is one of the few civilizations that have the three races under the same protection of laws. Founded by an Elder, one of the five surviving creators of Terra, it is the place where people are given equal chance to succeed, so long as you have the will and ambition to push through.

And she's back! To be honest, im tired and cant sit down to work on bot creating. I got three in the making right now, but i just want something released so here you go. Have fun, dont do anything crazy, and have a laugh!

Universe: Willowrose Universe
creator: ZetaBond001
